vpanel.header: 返回上一级

report.title: 员工存款凭证业绩明细

select.value:
SELECT A.VUCH_NBR ,left(A.VUCH_NBR,4)||'****'||right(trim(A.VUCH_NBR),4) as VUCH_NBR_STR ,A.EMP_ID ,A.EMP_NM ,A.MEASURE_DT ,A.CST_ID ,A.CST_NM
,A.PSTN_TYPE ,A.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,A.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,A.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,A.VUCH_TYPE_ID ,A.VUCH_TYPE_NM ,A.BIZ_TYPE_ID ,A.BIZ_TYPE_NM ,A.ORG_ID ,A.ORG_NM ,A.OPEN_DT ,A.VUCH_STATUS_ID ,A.VUCH_STATUS_NM ,A.RATIO ,A.CCY_ID ,A.LN_AMT ,A.BAL ,A.MTD_AVG_BAL ,A.QTD_AVG_BAL ,A.YTD_AVG_BAL ,A.VUCH_YTD_AVG_BAL ,A.Q_PROFIT ,A.Y_PROFIT ,A.ACT_Q_PROFIT ,A.ACT_Y_PROFIT
,A.CLAIM_DT ,bz.BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW FROM IBS.T2_EMP_DEP_LN_VUCH_PROFIT_DETAIL A inner join ibs.T9_BIZ_TYPE bz on A.BIZ_TYPE_ID=bz.BIZ_TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN IBS.T5_ORG B ON A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND B.ORG_TYPE_ID = 'EO' WHERE A.VUCH_TYPE_ID IN ('10','11','12','13','14','15','16','17','18') AND {#condition#} order by A.BIZ_TYPE_ID, A.OPEN_DT desc

option.source: @{Select distinct BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW from IBS.T9_BIZ_TYPE where BIZ_TYPE_CGY='存款' order by BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW}
option.label: BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW

report.footer: 提示:本系统币种为本外币合计

vpanel.header: 返回上一级

report.title: 员工存款凭证业绩明细

select.value:
SELECT A.VUCH_NBR ,left(A.VUCH_NBR,4)||'****'||right(trim(A.VUCH_NBR),4) as VUCH_NBR_STR ,A.EMP_ID ,A.EMP_NM ,A.MEASURE_DT ,A.CST_ID ,A.CST_NM
,A.PSTN_TYPE ,A.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,A.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,A.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,A.VUCH_TYPE_ID ,A.VUCH_TYPE_NM ,A.BIZ_TYPE_ID ,A.BIZ_TYPE_NM ,A.ORG_ID ,A.ORG_NM ,A.OPEN_DT ,A.VUCH_STATUS_ID ,A.VUCH_STATUS_NM ,A.RATIO ,A.CCY_ID ,A.LN_AMT ,A.BAL ,A.MTD_AVG_BAL ,A.QTD_AVG_BAL ,A.YTD_AVG_BAL ,A.VUCH_YTD_AVG_BAL ,A.Q_PROFIT ,A.Y_PROFIT ,A.ACT_Q_PROFIT ,A.ACT_Y_PROFIT ,bz.BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW FROM IBS.T2_EMP_DEP_LN_VUCH_PROFIT_DETAIL A inner join ibs.T9_BIZ_TYPE bz on A.BIZ_TYPE_ID=bz.BIZ_TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN IBS.T5_ORG B ON A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND B.ORG_TYPE_ID = 'EO' WHERE A.VUCH_TYPE_ID IN ('10','11','12','13','14','15','16','17','18') AND {#condition#} order by A.BIZ_TYPE_ID, A.OPEN_DT desc

option.source: @{Select distinct BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW from IBS.T9_BIZ_TYPE where BIZ_TYPE_CGY='存款' order by BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW}
option.label: BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW

report.footer: 提示:本系统币种为本外币合计

vpanel.header: 返回上一级

report.title: 员工存款凭证业绩明细

select.value:
SELECT A.VUCH_NBR ,left(A.VUCH_NBR,4)||'****'||right(trim(A.VUCH_NBR),4) as VUCH_NBR_STR ,A.EMP_ID ,A.EMP_NM ,A.MEASURE_DT ,A.CST_ID ,A.CST_NM
,A.PSTN_TYPE ,A.PSTN_TYPE_NM ,A.SUB_PSTN_TYPE ,A.SUB_PSTN_TYPE_NM ,A.VUCH_TYPE_ID ,A.VUCH_TYPE_NM ,A.BIZ_TYPE_ID ,A.BIZ_TYPE_NM ,A.ORG_ID ,A.ORG_NM ,A.OPEN_DT ,A.VUCH_STATUS_ID ,A.VUCH_STATUS_NM ,A.RATIO ,A.CCY_ID ,A.LN_AMT ,A.BAL ,A.MTD_AVG_BAL ,A.QTD_AVG_BAL ,A.YTD_AVG_BAL ,A.VUCH_YTD_AVG_BAL ,A.Q_PROFIT ,A.Y_PROFIT ,A.ACT_Q_PROFIT ,A.ACT_Y_PROFIT ,bz.BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW FROM IBS.T2_EMP_DEP_LN_VUCH_PROFIT_DETAIL A inner join ibs.T9_BIZ_TYPE bz on A.BIZ_TYPE_ID=bz.BIZ_TYPE_ID LEFT JOIN IBS.T5_ORG B ON A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND B.ORG_TYPE_ID = 'EO' WHERE A.VUCH_TYPE_ID IN ('10','11','12','13','14','15','16','17','18') AND {#condition#} order by A.BIZ_TYPE_ID, A.OPEN_DT desc

option.source: @{Select distinct BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW from IBS.T9_BIZ_TYPE where BIZ_TYPE_CGY='存款' order by BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW}
option.label: BIZ_TYPE_NM_NEW

report.footer: 提示:本系统币种为本外币合计
